notes: Machine-readable HARNESS-021 task-packet policy for the repo-local Pi harness.
This policy complements team definitions and executable routing/activation rules.
It is intentionally narrower than HARNESS-022 handoff formats or a queue-runner runtime.

discovery_summary: No additional discovery summary was provided; inspect the allowed paths and referenced docs before mutation.
defaults.cross_model_planning_note: No second-model planning note was provided.
evidence_expectations: Record the smallest relevant validation or test output.
Note unresolved risks or known gaps explicitly.
escalation_instructions: Escalate if the packet objective is unclear.
Escalate if file/domain boundaries would overlap with another worker.
Escalate if evidence is weak or contradictory.
Escalate if provider/model behavior becomes unreliable.

planning: Record inspected files and the discovery path used.
Keep scope bounded and avoid hidden assumptions.
build: Run the smallest relevant local validation before handoff.
Prefer cheap/local evidence before live provider-backed proof.
quality: Check acceptance criteria against actual evidence.
Do not trust self-reports without proof.
recovery: State failure type and likely cause.
Recommend retry, reroute, rollback, stop, or escalate explicitly.

build: Verify non-test wiring or registration for any new runtime component touched by the packet.
quality: Verify the claimed wiring proof is backed by concrete evidence.
